mapper.select: SELECT id, symbol, name, market, industry, list_date, delist_date, is_st, status FROM stock_basic ORDER BY symbol
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_basic (symbol, name, market, industry, list_date, delist_date, is_st, status) VALUES (#{symbol}, #{name}, #{market}, #{industry}, #{listDate}, #{delistDate}, #{isSt}, #{status}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), market = VALUES(market), industry = VALUES(industry), is_st = VALUES(is_st), status = VALUES(status)
